channel.title: LDS Scriptures — Audio (Eric's Private Feed)
channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.itunes:summary: Personal feed for Eric Wilde — official chapter-by-chapter audio of the standard works (Old Testament, New Testament, Book of Mormon, Doctrine and Covenants, Pearl of Great Price), streamed from the Church's CDN. Organized as seasons: 1=OT, 2=NT, 3=BoM, 4=D&C, 5=PoGP. Audio © Intellectual Reserve, Inc.; for personal study.
channel.description: Chapter-by-chapter audio of the LDS standard works, streamed from the official Church CDN. Personal use only.
